hausa.strong_acid_strong_base: Acid mai ƙarfi + Base mai ƙarfi
hausa.weak_acid_strong_base: Acid mai rauni + Base mai ƙarfi
hausa.strong_acid_weak_base: Acid mai ƙarfi + Base mai rauni
hausa.back_titration_of_antacid: Titration na baya na maganin acid
hausa.splash_proof_chemical_safety_goggles_n: Tabarau na tsaron sinadarai masu hana yayyafa, ba tabarau na yau da kullum ba
hausa.nitrile_gloves_worn: An sanya safar hannu na nitrile
hausa.protects_skin_from_corrosive_acids_and: Yana kare fata daga acid da base masu ci
hausa.button_it_up_protects_clothing_and_ski: Kulle maballin: yana kare tufafi da fata daga yayyafa
hausa.no_sandals_or_open_toed_shoes_in_the_c: Ba silifas ko takalma masu buɗe yatsun ƙafa a dakin gwaje-gwajen sinadarai
hausa.know_where_it_is_before_you_start_you_: San inda yake kafin ka fara: kana da daƙiƙa 10 idan an yayyafa maka
hausa.acetic_acid_is_flammable_know_your_nea: Acid na acetic yana ci: san na'urar kashe gobara mafi kusa da kai
hausa.sds_reviewed_for_chemicals: An sake duba takardar bayanan tsaro (SDS) don sinadarai
hausa.safety_data_sheets_list_all_hazards_pp: Takardun bayanan tsaro suna lissafa dukkan haɗari, kayan kariya, da hanyoyin gaggawa
hausa.always_add_titrant_slowly_near_the_exp: Kullum ƙara titrant a hankali kusa da makin ƙarshe da ake tsammani. Ɗiga ɗaya na iya canza pH sosai!
hausa.the_ph_is_changing_rapidly_in_a_real_l: pH yana canzawa da sauri! A dakin gwaje-gwaje na gaske, canza zuwa ƙara ɗiga-ɗiga kuma girgiza bayan kowace ɗiga.
hausa.you_overshot_the_equivalence_point_in_: Ka wuce makin daidaito! A dakin gwaje-gwaje na gaske, dole ne ka sake farawa da sabon samfuri.
hausa.good_lab_practice_always_rinse_the_bur: Kyakkyawan aikin dakin gwaje-gwaje: da farko wanke biuret da ruwa mai tsafta, sannan da maganin titrant kafin sake cikawa.
hausa.at_the_half_equivalence_point_ph_pka_t: A makin rabin-daidaito pH = pKa. Wannan shine tsakiyar yankin buffer!
hausa.kmno_is_a_strong_oxidizer_in_a_real_la: KMnO₄ mai ƙarfin oxidizer ne! A dakin gwaje-gwaje na gaske, ajiye shi nesa da masu narkar da kwayoyin halitta kuma yi amfani da fume hood. Shunayya → mara launi = makin ƙarshe.
hausa.polyprotic_acids_have_multiple_equival: Acid na polyprotic suna da maki masu yawa na daidaito! Lura yadda lanƙwasar S ke lebur tsakanin kowane maki (yankunan buffer).
hausa.in_a_back_titration_you_add_excess_aci: A titration na baya, da farko kana ƙara acid mai yawa, sannan ka yi titration na acid da ya rage. Yana aiki don analytes marasa narkewa kamar CaCO₃.
hausa.never_add_water_to_concentrated_acid_a: Kada ka taɓa ƙara ruwa cikin acid mai kauri! Kullum ƙara acid cikin ruwa. «Yi daidai: acid cikin ruwa.» Halayen fitar da zafi na iya haifar da yayyafa mai haɗari.
hausa.when_using_volatile_reagents_like_nh_o: Lokacin amfani da reagents masu tashi kamar NH₃ ko HCl (mai kauri), kullum yi aiki ƙarƙashin fume hood. Shaƙar tururin acid/base yana lalata nama na huhu.
hausa.read_the_burette_at_the_bottom_of_the_: Karanta biuret a ƙasan meniscus, tare da idonka a matakin saman ruwa. Kuskuren parallax yana shafar daidaito!
hausa.while_pouring_hcl_some_splashes_on_you: Yayin zuba HCl, kaɗan ya yayyafa a hannunka.
hausa.remove_clothing_rinse_under_running_wa: Cire tufafi, wanke ƙarƙashin ruwa mai gudana na minti 15+
hausa.correct_immediate_and_prolonged_rinsin: Daidai! Wankewa nan take da na dogon lokaci yana da matuƙar muhimmanci. Minti 15 yana hana lalacewar nama.
hausa.wipe_it_off_with_a_paper_towel: Shafe shi da tawul na takarda
hausa.wrong_wiping_can_spread_the_acid_and_p: Kuskure! Shafewa na iya yaɗa acid da tura shi cikin fatarka. Kana buƙatar ruwa mai gudana nan take.
hausa.apply_baking_soda_paste_directly_to_sk: Shafa manne na baking soda kai tsaye a fata
hausa.not_recommended_the_neutralization_rea: Ba a ba da shawara ba! Halayen kawar da ƙarfi yana samar da zafi (fitar da zafi) wanda zai iya ƙara ƙuna. Ruwa kullum shine amsa ta farko.
hausa.it_s_dilute_just_keep_working: Ya narke, kawai ci gaba da aiki
hausa.dangerous_even_dilute_acids_can_cause_: Haɗari! Ko da acid da suka narke na iya haifar da ƙuna cikin lokaci. Kullum magance saduwar sinadarai nan take.
hausa.naoh_solution_splashes_into_your_eyes_: Yayin girgizawa, maganin NaOH ya yayyafa cikin idanunka.
hausa.go_to_eyewash_station_immediately_rins: Je tashar wanke ido nan take, wanke minti 15+, riƙe fatun ido a buɗe
hausa.correct_speed_is_everything_you_have_a: Daidai! Gudu shine komai: kana da kusan daƙiƙa 10 kafin mummunan lalacewa ya fara. Riƙe fatun ido a buɗe kuma karkata kanka don hana gurɓatawa yaɗa zuwa ɗayan ido.
hausa.rub_your_eyes_and_blink_rapidly: Shafa idanunka kuma ka ƙiftawa da sauri
hausa.never_rub_this_spreads_the_chemical_ac: Kada ka taɓa shafawa! Wannan yana yaɗa sinadarin a faɗin babban saman ido kuma na iya tsattsage cornea.
hausa.use_eye_drops_from_the_first_aid_kit: Yi amfani da ɗigon ido daga kayan agajin gaggawa
hausa.eye_drops_are_insufficient_you_need_hi: Ɗigon ido bai isa ba! Kana buƙatar wankewa mai yawa na minti 15+. Ɗigon ido ba zai iya bayar da hakan ba.
hausa.finish_the_experiment_first_then_wash: Da farko gama gwajin, sannan ka wanke
hausa.extremely_dangerous_naoh_causes_alkali: Mai matuƙar haɗari! NaOH yana haifar da ƙuna na alkali wanda ke shiga zurfi cikin lokaci. Kowace daƙiƙa tana da muhimmanci. Raunin ido na sinadarai shine dalili #1 na makanta a dakin gwaje-gwaje.
hausa.large_acid_spill_on_bench: Babban zuban acid a kan tebur!
hausa.you_knock_over_the_beaker_of_0_1m_hcl_: Ka juye beaker na 0.1M HCl, ya zubar kusan 200 ml a kan tebur.
hausa.alert_others_contain_with_absorbent_ne: Faɗakar da wasu, tsare da mai shanyewa, kawar da ƙarfi da NaHCO₃, tsaftace da ruwa
hausa.perfect_procedure_1_alert_nearby_stude: Cikakkiyar hanya! (1) Faɗakar da ɗalibai da ke kusa (2) Tsare yaɗuwa da faɗin mai shanyewa (3) Yayyafa sodium bicarbonate don kawar da ƙarfi (4) Tsaftace da ruwa (5) Zubar da shi yadda ya kamata.
hausa.just_flood_it_with_lots_of_water: Kawai cika shi da ruwa mai yawa
hausa.partially_right_but_incomplete_floodin: Daidai a wani ɓangare amma bai cika ba. Cikawa yana yaɗa acid ƙari kuma baya kawar da ƙarfinsa. Da farko tsare, sannan kawar da ƙarfi, sannan wanke.
hausa.tell_the_teacher_and_don_t_touch_it: Faɗa wa malami kuma kada ka taɓa shi
hausa.telling_the_teacher_is_good_but_at_0_1: Faɗa wa malami yana da kyau amma a 0.1M ana iya sarrafa wannan. Ya kamata ka fara tsarewa nan take yayin da wani ke faɗakar da malamin. Kada ka bar shi ya kai gefen tebur.
hausa.soak_it_up_with_paper_towels: Shanye shi da tawul na takarda
hausa.paper_towels_are_not_appropriate_for_a: Tawul na takarda ba su dace da zuban acid ba! Ba sa kawar da ƙarfin acid kuma za ka sarrafa kayan da suka jiƙe da acid. Yi amfani da kayan zuba daidai.
hausa.mysterious_fumes_rising: Tururi mai ban mamaki na tashi!
hausa.while_working_with_ammonia_nh_you_noti: Yayin aiki da ammonia (NH₃), ka lura da wari mai kaifi kuma idanunka sun fara zubar da hawaye.
hausa.move_the_experiment_to_the_fume_hood_i: Matsar da gwajin zuwa fume hood nan take, saka iska a wurin
hausa.correct_volatile_chemicals_like_nh_mus: Daidai! Sinadarai masu tashi kamar NH₃ dole ne a sarrafa su ƙarƙashin fume hood. Idan za ka iya jin ƙamshinsa, kana shaƙar sa. Buɗe tagogi kuma fita zuwa iska mai kyau idan hood yana nesa.
hausa.put_on_a_face_mask_and_continue: Sanya abin rufe fuska kuma ci gaba
hausa.a_regular_face_mask_does_not_protect_a: Abin rufe fuska na yau da kullum ba ya kariya daga tururin sinadarai! Kana buƙatar kariyar numfashi daidai (babu a mafi yawan dakunan gwaje-gwaje na makaranta) ko fume hood.
hausa.fanning_is_for_wafting_to_detect_odors: Fifitawa na don kawo iska a hankali don gano wari (kawo iska sannu-sannu zuwa hancinka). Ba ya cire tururi mai haɗari daga wurin. Kana buƙatar samun iska!
hausa.it_s_just_a_little_smell_keep_going: Ɗan wari ne kawai, ci gaba
hausa.dangerous_if_you_can_smell_nh_the_conc: Haɗari! Idan za ka iya jin ƙamshin NH₃, yawan sa na iya wuce iyaka mai aminci (25 ppm). Saduwa mai tsawo tana haifar da ƙuna na sinadarai a hanyar numfashi. NH₃ na >300 ppm na iya kashe rai.
hausa.a_classmate_suggests_cleaning_the_benc: Yayin da kake da maganin ammonia a buɗe, abokin karatu ya ba da shawarar tsaftace tebur da bleach.
hausa.stop_them_immediately_bleach_ammonia_t: Dakatar da su nan take! Bleach + ammonia = iskar chloramine mai guba
hausa.life_saving_action_naocl_2nh_2nh_cl_ch: Aikin ceton rai! NaOCl + 2NH₃ → 2NH₂Cl (chloramine) — iska mai guba da ke haifar da mummunar lalacewar numfashi. Wannan ɗaya ne daga cikin haɗe-haɗe na kwatsam mafi haɗari a dakin gwaje-gwaje. Kullum kawar da ƙarfi da zubar da dukkan sinadarai kafin amfani da kowane maganin tsaftacewa.
hausa.sure_bleach_is_a_disinfectant_it_shoul: Tabbas, bleach magani ne na kashe ƙwayoyin cuta, ya kamata ya yi kyau
hausa.extremely_dangerous_mixing_bleach_naoc: Mai matuƙar haɗari! Haɗa bleach (NaOCl) da ammonia yana samar da iskar chloramine mai guba. Ya haifar da mutuwa a dakunan gwaje-gwaje da gidaje. Kada ka taɓa haɗa bleach da kowane sinadari.
hausa.it_should_be_fine_if_the_ammonia_is_di: Ya kamata ya yi kyau idan ammonia ya narke
hausa.wrong_even_dilute_ammonia_reacts_with_: Kuskure! Ko da ammonia da ya narke yana amsawa da bleach don samar da iskar chloramine mai guba. Halayen na faruwa a kowane yawa. Babu narkewa mai aminci don haɗa waɗannan sinadarai.
hausa.just_open_a_window_and_it_will_be_fine: Kawai buɗe taga kuma zai yi kyau
hausa.ventilation_does_not_make_it_safe_to_g: Samun iska ba ya sa ya zama lafiya samar da iska mai guba! Chloramine yana haifar da wahalar numfashi nan take. Rigakafi shine kawai hanyar da za a karɓa.
hausa.delivers_precise_volumes_of_titrant: Yana ba da ainihin yawan titrant.
hausa.holds_the_analyte_solution_being_titra: Yana riƙe maganin analyte da ake yi masa titration.
hausa.changes_color_to_signal_the_endpoint: Yana canza launi don nuna makin ƙarshe.
hausa.contains_distilled_water_for_rinsing: Yana ɗauke da ruwa mai tsafta don wankewa.
hausa.goggles_gloves_and_lab_coat: Tabarau, safar hannu, da rigar dakin gwaje-gwaje
hausa.all_three_are_mandatory_goggles_protec: Duka ukun tilas ne: tabarau na kare idanu daga yayyafa, safar hannu na kare hannaye daga masu ci, kuma riga na kare tufafi da fata.
hausa.rinse_with_running_water_for_15_min: Wanke da ruwa mai gudana na minti 15+
hausa.water_first_always_the_15_minute_rinse: Ruwa da farko kullum! Wankewa na minti 15 yana da muhimmanci. Masu kawar da ƙarfi na iya haifar da halayen fitar da zafi a fata.
hausa.where_moles_of_acid_moles_of_base: Inda moles na acid = moles na base
hausa.the_equivalence_point_is_the_stoichiom: Makin daidaito shine makin stoichiometric. pH a daidaito ya dogara da ƙarfin acid/base — pH 7 ne kawai don acid mai ƙarfi + base mai ƙarfi.
hausa.the_exothermic_reaction_can_cause_viol: Halayen fitar da zafi na iya haifar da tafasa mai ƙarfi da yayyafa
hausa.when_water_hits_concentrated_acid_the_: Lokacin da ruwa ya buga acid mai kauri, zafin da aka fitar na iya tafasa ruwa nan take, yana haifar da yayyafa mai ƙarfi na acid mai zafi. Ƙara acid cikin ruwa yana rarraba zafi a faɗin babban yawan ruwa.
hausa.at_equivalence_only_the_conjugate_base: A daidaito, base na haɗe (A⁻) kaɗai ke rage. Base na haɗe na acid mai rauni kansa base ne mai rauni, wanda ke sa maganin ya zama base (pH > 7).
hausa.strong_acid_strong_base_or_weak_acid_s: Acid mai ƙarfi + base mai ƙarfi ko acid mai rauni + base mai ƙarfi
hausa.phenolphthalein_transitions_at_ph_8_2_: Phenolphthalein yana canzawa a pH 8.2-10.0 wanda ya dace da pH na daidaiton base na titration na acid mai rauni + base mai ƙarfi. Yana kuma aiki don acid mai ƙarfi+base mai ƙarfi domin tsalle na ketare kewayonsa.
hausa.bleach_ammonia_chloramine_gas_toxic_bl: Bleach + ammonia = iskar chloramine (mai guba). Bleach + acid = iskar chlorine (mai guba). Duka biyu na iya haifar da mummunan raunin numfashi ko mutuwa. Kada ka taɓa haɗa bleach da sinadarai.
hausa.23_45_has_4_significant_figures_the_la: 23.45 yana da lambobi 4 masu muhimmanci. Lamba ta ƙarshe (5) an kiyasta tsakanin alamomi. Biuret suna daidai har zuwa ±0.05 ml.
hausa.at_half_equivalence_ha_a_so_henderson_: A rabin-daidaito [HA] = [A⁻] don haka Henderson–Hasselbalch ya ba da pH = pKa + log(1) = pKa. Wannan shine tsakiyar yankin buffer.
hausa.when_handling_1m_concentrated_acids_or: Lokacin sarrafa acid ko base mai kauri >1M
hausa.face_shields_provide_splash_protection: Garkuwar fuska na ba da kariyar yayyafa ga dukan fuska. Ana buƙata don masu ci masu kauri (>1M), dumama, da kowace hanya mai haɗarin yayyafa fiye da yankin ido.
hausa.naoh_causes_alkali_burns_that_penetrat: NaOH yana haifar da ƙuna na alkali wanda ke shiga ido cikin daƙiƙa 10. Ba tare da tabarau ba, yayyafa ɗaya na iya haifar da asarar gani na dindindin.
hausa.concentrated_hcl_dissolves_skin_on_con: HCl mai kauri yana narkar da fata da zarar ya taɓa. Ko da acid da suka narke na haifar da ƙaiƙayi. Hannayenka sun fi kusa da sinadarai.
hausa.a_splash_of_acid_or_base_will_burn_thr: Yayyafa na acid ko base zai ƙone ta cikin tufafi da fata. Riga na ba da murfin shamaki wanda za a iya cirewa.
hausa.a_dropped_beaker_sends_glass_and_chemi: Beaker da ya faɗi yana aika gilashi da sinadarai a faɗin ƙasa. Takalma masu buɗe yatsun ƙafa na nufin acid a ƙafafu tsirara.
hausa.lab_access_granted: An ba da izinin shiga dakin gwaje-gwaje
hausa.all_safety_protocols_confirmed: An tabbatar da dukkan ka'idojin tsaro
hausa.equip_each_piece_of_ppe_before_proceed: Sanya kowane kayan kariya kafin ci gaba. A dakin gwaje-gwaje na gaske, ba za ka iya taɓa sinadarai ba tare da cikakkiyar kariya ba.
hausa.continue_to_lab_scan_station: Ci gaba zuwa tashar binciken dakin gwaje-gwaje
hausa.continue_to_lab_scan: 🔬 Ci gaba zuwa binciken dakin gwaje-gwaje →
hausa.find_each_piece_of_safety_equipment_on: Nemo kowane kayan tsaro a taswirar dakin gwaje-gwaje. A gaggawa ta gaske, daƙiƙai suna da muhimmanci — dole ne ka san inda komai yake kafin ka fara.
hausa.the_10_second_rule_if_chemicals_splash: Dokar daƙiƙa 10: idan sinadarai suka yayyafa cikin idanunka, kana da kusan daƙiƙa 10 don isa tashar wanke ido kafin lalacewa ta dindindin ta fara. Riƙe fatun ido a buɗe kuma wanke minti 15+.
hausa.remember_p_a_s_s_pull_the_pin_aim_at_b: Tuna P.A.S.S.: Pull (Ja fil), Aim (Nufi ƙasan wuta), Squeeze (Danna hannu), Sweep (Share daga wannan gefe zuwa ɗayan). Acid na acetic da wasu masu narkarwa suna ci — san wannan wuri kafin ka fara.
hausa.sds_documents_list_all_hazards_require: Takardun SDS suna lissafa dukkan haɗari, kayan kariya da ake buƙata, matakan agajin gaggawa, da lambobin gaggawa don kowane sinadari a dakin gwaje-gwaje. Duba su kafin sarrafa kowane sinadari.
hausa.lab_safety_map_complete: 🗺️ Taswirar tsaron dakin gwaje-gwaje ta cika!
hausa.you_can_now_locate_all_emergency_equip: Yanzu za ka iya nemo dukkan kayan gaggawa daga teburinka. A gaggawa, kowace daƙiƙa tana da muhimmanci — wannan ilimi na iya ceton rai.
hausa.review_every_chemical_you_will_handle_: Duba kowane sinadari da za ka sarrafa yau. Danna kowace katin don tabbatar da cewa ka fahimci haɗarin.
hausa.tap_to_acknowledge_you_ve_reviewed_thi: ☝ Danna don tabbatar da cewa ka duba wannan sinadari
hausa.emergency_response_drill: 🚨 Atisayen mayar da martani na gaggawa
hausa.enter_lab_safety_confirmed: Shiga dakin gwaje-gwaje — An tabbatar da tsaro
hausa.lab_safety_confirmed_enter_virtual_lab: 🧪 An tabbatar da tsaron dakin gwaje-gwaje — Shiga dakin gwaje-gwaje na kama-da-wane
hausa.titration_lab_keyboard_shortcuts_1_thr: Dakin gwaje-gwaje na titration. Gajerun hanyoyin madannai: 1 zuwa 5 canza shafi.
hausa.ppe_active_lab_safety_verified: Kayan kariya suna aiki • An tabbatar da tsaron dakin gwaje-gwaje
hausa.eyewash_10_second_rule_fire_extinguish: 🚿 Wanke ido: dokar daƙiƙa 10 • 🧯 An samu kashe gobara • 📋 An duba SDS
hausa.virtual_titration_lab: 🧪 Dakin gwaje-gwaje na titration na kama-da-wane
hausa.add_titrant_drop_by_drop_until_indicat: Ƙara titrant ɗiga-ɗiga har sai alama ta canza launi. Makin daidaito = daidaiton stoichiometric; makin ƙarshe = inda alama ke canzawa. Ba iri ɗaya suke ba kullum.
hausa.match_real_world_unknowns_by_titrating: Daidaita abubuwan da ba a sani ba na duniya ta gaske ta hanyar yin titration har zuwa ±0.05 ml na ƙimar ka'ida. Bi diddigin daidaito + gudu; ba da maki ya dace da AP Chem.
hausa.safety_drills_what_could_go_wrong: Atisayen tsaro — Me zai iya yin kuskure
hausa.burette_explodes_acid_burns_spill_indi: Biuret ya fashe, zuban ƙuna na acid, an ƙara alama da sauri sosai. Yi atisayen jerin martani daidai kafin ya zama muhimmanci a dakin gwaje-gwaje na gaske.
hausa.burette_tolerance_0_05_ml_volumetric_f: Haƙurin biuret 0.05 ml; flask na yawa 0.10 ml; pipette 0.02 ml. Ajin daidaito A da B yana ninka kuskure. Gyara yana da muhimmanci fiye da yadda ɗalibai suke tsammani.
hausa.stock_diluent_desired_concentration_th: Stock + mai narkarwa → yawan da ake so. Matsalolin AP Chem 4 da aka fi gwadawa suna raguwa zuwa wannan lissafi ɗaya. Bi diddigin lambobi masu muhimmanci: mafi rauni ma'auni yana ƙayyade amsa.
hausa.buffer_discovery_when_does_a_buffer_ho: Gano buffer — Yaushe buffer ke dawwama?
hausa.adjust_acid_strength_a_ha_ratio_starti: Daidaita ƙarfin acid, rabo na [A⁻]/[HA], da pH na farawa. Sakamako daban: buffer mai kyau ko buffer mara kyau (bayan ƙara acid ƙari na 20%). Babu maki, babu bayyanawa — bincike da lura kawai.
hausa.redox_titration_not_a_ph_curve: ⚗ Titration na redox — ba lanƙwasar pH ba.
hausa.the_trace_shows_relative_reaction_prog: Layin yana nuna ci gaban halayen kwatanci, ba pH ba — babu mitar pH a nan. Makin ƙarshe shine launin ruwan hoda na farko mai raunana wanda ke dawwama daga ɗan ƙari na MnO₄⁻ (yana amsawa shunayya → mara launi har zuwa lokacin). Karanta wannan makin ƙarshe daga launi.
hausa.reset_titration_volume_to_zero: Sake saita yawan titration zuwa sifili
hausa.where_moles_of_acid_moles_of_base_the_: — inda moles na acid = moles na base. pH a wannan maki ya dogara da ƙarfin acid/base.
hausa.where_the_indicator_changes_color_idea: — inda alama ke canza launi. An zaɓa da kyau don makin ƙarshe ≈ makin daidaito.
hausa.the_flat_part_of_a_weak_acid_base_curv: — ɓangaren lebur na lanƙwasar acid/base mai rauni inda pH ke tsayayya da canji (Henderson–Hasselbalch na aiki).
hausa.weak_acids_bases_that_change_color_at_: — acid/base masu rauni da ke canza launi a takamaiman kewayon pH. Zaɓi wanda kewayon canjinsa ya haɗa da pH na daidaito.
hausa.lab_safety_best_practices: ⚠️ Mafi kyawun ayyukan tsaron dakin gwaje-gwaje
hausa.acid_spill_neutralize_with_sodium_bica: — Zuban acid: kawar da ƙarfi da sodium bicarbonate, sannan wanke. Zuban base: kawar da ƙarfi da acid na citric mai narkewa. Kullum faɗakar da wasu a dakin gwaje-gwaje.
hausa.never_mix_bleach_with_ammonia_toxic_ch: — Kada ka taɓa haɗa bleach da ammonia (iskar chloramine mai guba). Kada ka taɓa ƙara ruwa cikin acid mai kauri (haɗarin yayyafa na fitar da zafi — kullum ƙara acid cikin ruwa).
hausa.rinse_the_burette_with_the_titrant_sol: — Wanke biuret da maganin titrant kafin cikawa. Girgiza a hankali bayan kowane ƙara. Karanta biuret a ƙasan meniscus.
hausa.neutralized_acid_base_solutions_ph_6_8: — Maganin acid/base da aka kawar da ƙarfi (pH 6–8) za a iya zuba a magudanar ruwa da ruwa mai yawa. Don maganin mai kauri duba manufar sharar sinadarai ta cibiyarka.
hausa.using_simple_everyday_words_and_short_: Ta amfani da kalmomi masu sauƙi na yau da kullum da gajerun jimloli
hausa.for_a_5th_grade_student_brief_and_frie: Don ɗalibin aji 5, a taƙaice da abokantaka
hausa.for_a_high_school_chemistry_student_ac: Don ɗalibin sunadarai na sakandare, daidai amma mai sauƙin fahimta
hausa.click_explain_to_have_the_ai_tutor_des: Danna «Bayyana» don malamin AI ya bayyana wannan titration a matakin karatu da ka zaɓa.
hausa.lab_safety_chemistry_challenge: 🏆 Ƙalubalen tsaron dakin gwaje-gwaje da sunadarai
hausa.lab_safety_incident_simulator: 🚨 Na'urar kwaikwayo ta lamarin tsaron dakin gwaje-gwaje
hausa.practice_responding_to_real_lab_emerge: Yi atisayen mayar da martani ga gaggawar dakin gwaje-gwaje na gaske. Zaɓi martani daidai don kowane yanayi. Waɗannan atisaye na iya ceton ranka a dakin gwaje-gwaje na gaske!
hausa.lab_equipment_proper_technique: 🔬 Kayan dakin gwaje-gwaje da fasaha daidai
hausa.master_the_correct_technique_for_each_: Ƙware fasaha daidai don kowane kayan aiki. Kyakkyawar fasaha = sakamako daidai + aikin dakin gwaje-gwaje mai aminci.
hausa.c_v_c_v_calculate_how_to_dilute_a_stoc: C₁V₁ = C₂V₂ — lissafa yadda za a narkar da maganin stock zuwa yawan da ake nufi.
hausa.always_add_acid_to_water_never_water_t: Kullum ƙara acid cikin ruwa, kada ka ƙara ruwa cikin acid. Haɗawa yana fitar da zafi kuma na iya haifar da tafasa mai ƙarfi da yayyafa acid mai kauri.
hausa.add_the_stock_solution_to_the_water_ne: Ƙara maganin stock cikin ruwa (kada ka taɓa ƙara ruwa cikin acid!)
hausa.stopper_and_invert_10_times_to_mix_tho: Rufe kuma juya sau 10 don haɗawa sosai
hausa.strong_acid_strong_base_ph_meter_shows: Acid mai ƙarfi + base mai ƙarfi · Mitar pH tana nuna tsalle
hausa.three_sliders_weak_acid_strength_ka_bu: Sliders uku: ƙarfin acid mai rauni (Ka), rabo na buffer [A⁻]/[HA], da pH na farawa. Kwaikwayo yana gaya maka ko buffer ya dawwama ko ya gaza bayan ƙara acid ƙari na 20% (sakamako daban — babu «makin buffer» na lamba). Motsa sliders. Rubuta abubuwan da ka lura. Rubuta abin da ka gano game da abin da ke sa buffer ya zama mai kyau.
hausa.your_hypothesis_free_text_no_right_ans: Hasashenka (rubutu na kyauta — babu amsa daidai):
hausa.what_single_condition_makes_the_differ: Wane yanayi ɗaya ke bambanta tsakanin mai kyau da mara kyau? Rabo ya fi pKa muhimmanci? pH na farawa yana da muhimmanci ko kaɗan? Rubuta ka'idarka.
hausa.i_m_stuck_show_me_questions_to_think_a: 🤔 Na makale — nuna mini tambayoyi na tunani (babu amsoshi)
hausa.open_questions_investigate_by_manipula: Tambayoyi a buɗe — bincika ta hanyar sarrafa:
hausa.fix_ratio_at_1_0_sweep_pka_from_2_to_1: Saita rabo a 1.0. Share pKa daga 2 zuwa 12. Wasu ƙimomin pKa suna buffer mafi kyau ta zahiri? Me ya sa zai iya zama haka?
hausa.set_pka_4_74_acetic_acid_sweep_ratio_f: Saita pKa = 4.74 (acid na acetic). Share rabo daga 0.05 zuwa 20. A wane rabo buffer ke dawwama? Akwai «kwali mai kyau» na daidaito a rabo?
hausa.find_one_good_buffer_then_change_one_s: Nemo buffer mai kyau ɗaya. Sannan canza slider ɗaya har sai ya zama mara kyau. Wane canji ɗaya ne mafi tasiri?
hausa.log_4_5_good_buffers_with_different_pk: Rubuta buffer masu kyau 4-5 masu ƙimomin pKa daban. pH na farawa nasu suna da menene daidai da pKa nasu?
hausa.in_real_biochemistry_blood_is_buffered: A ilimin sunadarai na halitta na gaske, ana yin buffer na jini a pH 7.4 — wane pKa ne zai fi dacewa da wannan tsarin buffer? Bincika ta hanyar neman buffer na phosphate da bicarbonate.
hausa.no_answers_will_be_revealed_investigat: Ba za a bayyana amsoshi ba. Bincika.
hausa.i_think_i_understand_the_trade_offs_le: Ina tsammanin na fahimci sasantawa — bari in bayyana su da kalmomina
hausa.explain_in_your_own_words_what_is_the_: Bayyana da kalmominka: menene alaƙar da ke tsakanin pKa, rabo, da pH na farawa? Wane yanayi ɗaya (ko haɗi) ke sa buffer ya dawwama fiye da acid? Me ya sa kewayon rabo yake da muhimmanci?
hausa.saved_notice_nobody_checked_your_answe: ✓ An ajiye. Bayani — babu wanda ya duba amsarka. Wannan shine yanayin binciken da ɗalibi ke jagoranta.
hausa.design_note_no_buffer_capacity_score_n: Bayanin ƙira: babu makin ƙarfin buffer, babu maballin bayyanawa, babu binciken jarrabawa. Ana nuna sakamako a matsayin yanayi 2 daban (mai kyau / mara kyau) maimakon jeri mai ci gaba — da gangan, don rage halin inganta. Muhimmin abu shine bincike, ba lamba ba.
